meta.notes: Fresh rerun of the Codex benchmark prompt with each timed step executed separately. No install step and no upload step. The script was run with --target-lang es --no-lip-sync. Internal stage timings were inferred from the script's own elapsed-time log markers. The measured skill_run duration exceeded the last logged pipeline stage because cloned-voice cleanup continued after the script printed Done:. Token totals came from tools/extract-codex-tokens.py --latest --json after the benchmark run.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Portrait vlog benchmark asset with spoken English audio for Spanish dubbing without lip sync.

task.name: video-translation
task.purpose: Benchmark the local video-translation skill against the standard 67.8s daily vlog asset using Spanish dubbing with no lip sync.
task.expected_output: A Spanish-dubbed mp4 with the original video track and replaced audio, using a cloned speaker voice when cloning succeeds.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/video-translation/.

steps.name: extract_audio
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: Extracting audio started at 0.0s and Whisper transcription started at 1.2s.

steps.name: whisper_transcribe
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: Whisper stage ran from 1.2s to 7.4s. Transcript length was 691 chars.

steps.name: translate_gpt4o
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: translation ran from 7.4s to 11.3s. Translated text length was 734 chars.

steps.name: voice_clone_elevenlabs
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: voice cloning ran from 11.3s to 15.4s. Cloned voice ID: nRCuzgUNNvOsfGEmxMHv.

steps.name: tts_eleven_v3
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: TTS ran from 15.4s to 31.8s using eleven_v3. Output TTS audio size was 699.6 KB.

steps.name: replace_audio_ffmpeg
steps.notes: Inferred approximately from the final stage marker at 31.8s and the rounded Done line at 32s.

execution.notes: Execution total is probe + full skill_run. Named substep durations come from the script's elapsed-time stage markers and sum to about 32s; the remaining ~42.3s inside skill_run occurred after Done: was printed and likely came from cloned-voice cleanup before process exit.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only; output remained on disk at /tmp/bench_vt_output.mp4.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-codex-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. All 8 skills ran in a single Codex session with monotonically increasing token counts.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
